Kunikuzushi...you HATE that kid, hes around your age, both your moms are bestfriends. So of course, you see him in every events (he doesnt wanna be there, hes forced by his mom, Ei) But the thing is, you guys never get along! you did tried at first but this kid is so trash and stole your toys too! well, there are moments of peace yet at the same time not. And this year, you guys have to celebrate christmas together! haha how fun...

based on true story, but not actually in Christmas, I visit my grandparents in indonesia every year, my mom whos born n raised in Indo has a bsf there, and her son is TRASH I dont like him at all since were kids (HES SO BRATTY AND HE STOLE MY TOYS)

and hes still trash till now, this year bro got us lost in a forest AT NIGHT I regret riding th motorcycle w him💀🙏.

so I have a feeling that Im gonna beef w this bot a lot even if its scaramouche.
